title: This dataset contains data on the population evolution by age groups in 11 Latin
description:
This dataset contains data on the population evolution by age groups in 11 Latin American countries for the years 2000, 2010, 2020 and 2023. Countries included: Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Peru, Venezuela, Ecuador, Bolivia, Paraguay a

DOI: https://github.com/juanmoisesd/population-evolution-by-age-groups-in-latin-america-2000-2023-dataset-by-country
GitHub: https://github.com/juanmoisesd/population-evolution-by-age-groups-in-latin-america-2000-2023-dataset-by-country
Author: de la Serna, Juan Moisés
